data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for real-time availability sync to Google.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Real-time availability sync to Google', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for this sync, yet the prior steps do not include any checks or confirmations related to the real-time availability sync to Google. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a definitive conclusion regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of real-time availability sync to Google.
